Class ProcessTaskService

Namespace
VendorProcessManagerV1.Services
Assembly
VendorProcessManagerV1.dll

Service class for operations on process tasks such as starting and completing.

public class ProcessTaskService : IProcessTaskService

Methods

ApproveTaskAsync(Guid, string, ApproveStatus, string?)

checks to see if user has permission to Approve task. User must be member of Approver Team before setting task to approved.

public Task<ApproveTaskResult> ApproveTaskAsync(Guid taskId, string userId, ApproveStatus decision, string? notes)

Parameters

taskId Guid

The identifier for the task.

userId string

The identifier for the user.

decision ApproveStatus

The approval decision.

notes string

Approval notes.

Returns

Task<ApproveTaskResult>

True if approval is possible, otherwise False

CanApproveTaskAsync(Guid, string)

Checks the User's Team to see if they can approve the task

public Task<bool> CanApproveTaskAsync(Guid taskId, string userId)

Parameters

taskId Guid

The identifier for the task.

userId string

The identifier for the user.

Returns

Task<bool>

True is user can approve task. False if otherwise.

CanStartTaskAsync(Guid)

Checks to see if the Task can be started be checking preceeding task is completed or skipped.

public Task<bool> CanStartTaskAsync(Guid taskId)

Parameters

taskId Guid

The identifier for the task

Returns

Task<bool>

CompleteTaskAsync(Guid, Guid?, string)

Sets Task to Completed. Selects next task in process by checking for transition. Sets next selected task to In Progress.

public Task<CompleteTaskResult> CompleteTaskAsync(Guid taskId, Guid? selectedTransitionId, string completedById)

Parameters

taskId Guid

The identifier for the task.

selectedTransitionId Guid?

Teh selected transition.

completedById string

The identifier for the user.

Returns

Task<CompleteTaskResult>

Completed task result of true if successful, otherwise false.

GetAvailableTransitionsAsync(Guid)

Gets the different options for the next step in the flowchart.

public Task<List<ProcessTemplateTransition>> GetAvailableTransitionsAsync(Guid taskId)

Parameters

taskId Guid

Returns

Task<List<ProcessTemplateTransition>>
